title: I was stalked when I started practising law: Orissa High Court Justice Savitri Ratho
description: Orissa High Court Justice Savitri Ratho on Sunday recalled that she was stalked during her early years as a lawyer.She said the incident occurred when she had just begun practicing law and that the situation was eventually handled with the help of her male colleagues at the Bar.Recounting her experience from the early days of her legal career, Justice Ratho said she initially noticed a man repeatedly appearing wherever she was in court.She said the situation later escalated when the man even app
